provenance.source: Discogs monthly data dump (CC0), one-hop working set
provenance.license: Derived from the Discogs monthly CC0 data dumps. See docs/DATA_AND_RIGHTS.md.
provenance.note: Derived from a bounded one-hop working set; the private collection seed used to build that working set is never published. Every round's hops require an explicit, displayable instrument/vocal role on both sides.
